title: BEM-865 inspect Claude dispatcher
objective:
Run script:
"""
wf = Path('.github/workflows/claude_internal_auditor_dispatcher.yml')
text = wf.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if wf.exists() else ''
out = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_CLAUDE_DISPATCHER_WORKFLOW_INSPECTION.md')
out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
keys = ['workflow_dispatch', 'inputs', 'trace_id', 'task', 'mailbox', 'from_claude', 'CLAUDE', 'ANTHROPIC', 'gh workflow run', 'actions/checkout']
found = []
for k in keys:
    if k.lower() in text.lower():
        found.append(k)
lines = text.splitlines()
interesting = []
for i, line in enumerate(lines, 1):
    low = line.lower()
    if any(k.lower() in low for k in keys):
        interesting.append(str(i) + ': ' + line)
out.write_text('# BEM-865 Claude dispatcher workflow inspection\nExists: ' + str(wf.exists()) + '\nFound keys: ' + ', '.join(found) + '\n\n## Interesting lines\n' + '\n'.join(interesting[:120]) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
status = 'WORKFLOW_EXISTS' if wf.exists() else 'WORKFLOW_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_' + status + '_CLAUDE_DISPATCHER.md')
marker.write_text(out.read_text(encoding='utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(out))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('inspected claude_internal_auditor_dispatcher workflow')
"""
No issue comments.
